summary: Verified bug fix on /livraison (Notre carte de menus): the Payer/Submit button now becomes ACTIVE in 'Retrait sur place' (pickup) mode without requiring an address, while remaining DISABLED in 'Livraison à domicile' mode until address is filled. All three review items PASS.
note_on_url: Review mentioned '/delivery' but actual React route in App.js (line 54) is '/livraison'. Used the real route for testing.

1_pickup_mode_bug_fix.steps: Add product to cart -> open cart -> 'Commander maintenant' -> switch to 'Retrait sur place' -> fill only Nom + Téléphone (no address) -> click Payer

2_delivery_mode_regression.steps: Fresh page -> default mode 'Livraison à domicile' + zone 'Cotonou' -> incrementally fill fields and observe disabled state

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for DialogContent (a11y warning, non-blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: DeliveryPage.jsx line 994 disabled condition `(orderForm.mode !== 'pickup' && !orderForm.address)` correctly mirrors line 371 server-side validation - both use the same `addressRequired = orderForm.mode !== 'pickup'` rule, so client/server validation stays in sync.
DeliveryPage.jsx is 1028 lines long - exceeds the 700-line guideline. Consider splitting (e.g. extract OrderFormDialog, CartDialog, MenuList) for maintainability. Not blocking.
Minor a11y: Dialog components are missing aria-describedby/Description. Add <DialogDescription> inside both Dialogs to silence the React warning and improve screen-reader support.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Le fix du bug 'submit disabled en pickup' est validé. Route réelle = /livraison (pas /delivery). Le flux Kkiapay s'ouvre correctement après clic 'Payer' en pickup mode. Pas besoin de re-tester.
rca_of_the_issue: Avant le fix, la condition `disabled` du bouton submit (ligne 994) utilisait `!orderForm.address` sans tenir compte du mode pickup. Comme `orderForm.address` est toujours vide en mode pickup (champ masqué), le bouton restait disabled. Fix appliqué : `(orderForm.mode !== 'pickup' && !orderForm.address)` - l'adresse n'est requise que si le mode n'est pas pickup. Cohérent avec la validation côté `handleSubmitOrder` (ligne 370-371).
